summary: Resolves POSIX-style path segments into a normalized path using the current working directory when needed.
signature_intent: Accepts zero or more path strings and returns a normalized path string.
behavior: Validates each provided segment as a path string.
Combines segments so later absolute input determines the base.
Uses the current working directory when the provided segments do not establish an absolute base.
Normalizes redundant separators, current-directory markers, and parent-directory markers.
Returns an absolute path when an absolute base is available.
Returns a relative normalized path when no absolute base is available.
edge_cases: With no arguments, returns the normalized current working directory.
With only empty segments, resolves from the current working directory.
Returns '/' when normalization resolves to the filesystem root.
Returns '.' when resolution produces no path content and no absolute base exists.
forbidden_details: Repository and source-location details are intentionally omitted.
Low-level implementation steps are intentionally omitted.
